_description: Recommended SL/TP geometries from Prong 2 trade quality sweep
_method: Swept sl=0.30-1.20 step 0.05, tp=0.50-2.50 step 0.10. Found Pareto frontier between trade quality (TP%-SL%) and Sharpe.
_summary: Balanced geometry (sl=0.70, tp=1.60) gives +7pp TP%, -7pp SL% with Sharpe ~1.8. Regime-conditional allows tight in low vol, wider in high vol.

low_vol.label: tight — maximize Sharpe in calm markets

high_vol.label: loose SL, close TP — capture volatile moves

single_compromise.label: best single geometry balancing TP%/SL% and Sharpe

key_findings: Current plateau geometry (sl~0.52, tp~1.96): TP=26%, SL=69%, Sharpe=2.5
Shorten TP only to 1.50: TP=32%, SL=66%, Sharpe=2.5 — no Sharpe cost
Balanced (sl=0.70, tp=1.60): TP=33%, SL=62%, Sharpe=1.8 — best trade-off
Extreme (sl=1.20, tp=0.50): TP=60%, SL=37%, Sharpe=-2.5 — not viable
Regime-conditional is the next step: vary geometry by market regime
